mapper.sql: pet.employee_id as pe_id, pet.tele_type, pet.tele, pet.tele_business_flag, pet.remarks, pet.tele_enabled_flag, pet.attribute1, pet.attribute2, pet.attribute3, pet.enabled_flag, pet.id, pet.create_time, pet.create_by, pet.update_time, pet.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.tele_type as ${tAlias}_tele_type, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.tele_business_flag as ${tAlias}_tele_business_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.tele_enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_tele_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_tele (employee_id, tele_type, tele, tele_business_flag, remarks, tele_enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{teleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teleBusinessFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teleEnabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_tele set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tele_type = #{teleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele_business_flag = #{teleBusinessFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele_enabled_flag = #{teleEnabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pet.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pet.remarks) > 0 then pet.remarks else null end as remarks, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pet.tele) > 0 then pet.tele else null end as tele, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pet.tele_type) > 0 then pet.tele_type else null end as tele_type from pm_employee_tele pet join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pet.employee_id where pet.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pet.remarks,pet.tele,pet.tele_type ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_tele (employee_id, tele_type, tele, tele_business_flag, tele_enabled_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, 2, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 1, 1, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
